===================
=== Earls Court 01.07.81 Info..txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan - Earls Court, London, England.  July 1, 1981

GENUINE, Previously Uncirculated Original Master Recording
Recorded by Jacktomthumb, Transferred to CDR August 2004
Source: Sony TC110A (BASF C90 Chrome Cassette)>Sony MDS-JB920>Pioneer 609>EAC>Shn

When trading, vineing, torrenting etc. DO NOT make false claims, what you have is at best a first generation copy,
not an Off Master as is often claimed.

Note: There is an Edit during "Girl From The North Country" due to tape turn. I have made this as unobtrusive as possible (JTT).

Disc One
1. Come On Inside This House
2. It's Gonna Rain
3. Show Me The Way, Lord
4. Saved By The Grace Of Your Love
5. GOTTA SERVE SOMEBODY
6. I BELIEVE IN YOU
7. LIKE A ROLLING STONE
8. Keep On Falling In Love (Till I Get It Right)
9. MAN GAVE NAMES TO ALL THE ANIMALS
10. MAGGIE'S FARM
11. HERE COMES THE SUN / GIRL FROM THE NORTH COUNTRY
12. DEAD MAN, DEAD MAN
13. SIMPLE TWIST OF FATE
14. BALLAD OF A THIN MAN
15. SLOW TRAIN
16. Walk Around Heaven All Day
17. LET'S BEGIN

Side Two
1. SHOT OF LOVE
2. LENNY BRUCE
3. MR. TAMBOURINE MAN
4. SOLID ROCK
5. JUST LIKE A WOMAN
6. WE JUST DISAGREE
7. MASTERS OF WAR
8. FOREVER YOUNG
9. HEART OF MINE
10. WATERED DOWN LOVE
11. WHEN YOU GONNA WAKE UP
12. IN THE GARDEN
13. BLOWIN' IN THE WIND
14. IT'S ALRIGHT MA (I'M ONLY BLEEDING)
15. KNOCKIN' ON HEAVEN'S DOOR


SHN converted into FLAC,
File names & tags edited by Chopen, February 2010
